\section{Summary}
\small{ Aspiring Embedded/Firmware Engineer with hands-on experience in C/C++ firmware development, UART protocol, STM32 and ESP32 microcontrollers, IoT sensor integration, and PCB debug through internships at Synopsys, Nvidia, and Jabil, plus academic projects including a smart irrigation system based on ESP-32. Strong foundation in digital design, scripting, and testbench development, committed to delivering reliable firmware solutions. }
